name: Deadly Deadly Dungeon v.1.0.4 MC 1.21.x Fabric/Forge/Quilt
changelog: This is the standard version 1.0.4 packed as a mod for fabric/forge/quilt/neoforge Minecraft 1.21.x Every world will generate with ddd's features and manual installation in datapack folder is not needed if the mod is installed. For changelog see the datapack version 1.0.4
